reviews.review_text: I last played this game on 6 November 2025. Today I decided to install the game again, and I expected to see new things in the game, but I only see 3 new masks, 0 new heists, 0 new weapons, and 0 new gloves and clothes, but there is a huge new section in the lobby just for players to spend money and buy DLC inside it.

i think the game is fun now compared to when it was in Beta and launch, the only reason i'm giving it a thumbs down is i spent $90 on pre-order, and the games lack of content at the moment, i have high hopes for PD3 i really do, but i would stick with PD2 for now.

When the game first came out, it kind of deserved the hate it got. It had virtually no content, compared to Payday 2. It didn't really offer anything new, except an updated engine. 

Came back to it months later, and it's been a blast, if i'm honest. Though, i'm playing Solo because Quickplay never finds anyone. because there's only 800 people playing the game. 

I think Payday 3 needs to drop a few free-weekends, and keep doing some sales. If people give it a chance, they'll see there's plenty here to enjoy. 

My main gripe is that there's not much to spend your money on. You're hard-locked to a few weapons in the beginning, and you're stuck waiting until others open up, based on level. Also, the weapon attachments are severely lacking compared to other games. it feels about 10 years behind in that regard. 

The theorycrafting for your character skills is pretty fun. I've been making a purely stealth/thief build, useful for Solo heists. But i can see lots of other options available. 

As Payday 2 was feeling dated to play, 3 seems to have polished things up quite a bit. 
The devs just need to quit being silly.

Payday 3 needs to tone down the paid expansions. Release some stuff for free. Maybe do some community events that draw new players in that don't require any money. again, do some free weekends, do some sales. get the payday 2 player-base over here (give them a big discount on 3), get your reviews up to Positive. then maybe you can think of releasing paid dlcs. 

There's a good game here. They just need to not kill it with bad corporate decisions, and listen to the player-base.

I gotta say. This is a watered down payday 2. I am so shocked that after ALL THIS TIME they still haven't really made this into a playable game and still selling cosmetics and DLCS. The solo mode is a pile of poop cause the AI are so bad and stupid they are basically worthless. All the missions and heists are so forgettable and no where NEAR as fun and memorable as payday 2. As of right now on 5/27/2026 I do not recommend payday 3. Please buy payday 2 and have literally 500 thousand times more fun. PLEASE let this review age badly. I really want to like this game. Also the performance is so terrible I am shocked they could have made it this bad.

[h2] It's finally better... It's actually so much better [/h2]
Payday 3 has seen very, very rough times especially at its launch, and it genuinely broke my heart. As a big fan of this franchise, I can't say how much I wanted this game to succeed and become popular, reaching the same amount of players as Payday 2, if not more. It's been difficult and sometimes so dishearting to see in which direction the studio and game was heading, but... I can finally say that the game is healing and heading in the right direction.
Gameplay is fun, guns feel fantastic, heists are interesting and fun, and so, so much more.

It has finally gotten better, and I believe it will only continue to get even better further on. Please, get this game and see for yourself how good it really is <3

After a rough start with the server connection issues and a few much needed patches, this game was genuinely fun. The Ammo Funnel skill in particular gave the gameplay a unique feel over payday 2. Sure the game is quite lacking in heists, even now. But it made up for it with very enjoyable gunplay and a fun skill system.

Now to the crux that ruined the game for me. In trying to please payday 2 fans who would never return to the game anyway, Overkill has overhauled the entire skill system to more resemble payday 2. No matter what I try in terms of builds, that spark the gameplay had before this pandering update is gone. And since it's an always online game we can't even downpatch the game to an older version.

It was a fun ride. Goodbye payday 3
Can't even play because the stupid nebula account you need to play the game doesn't even work or let you login. Your nebula account system sucks deep.

Из плюсов 
графика
новые механики 

Из минусов
0 контента

В игре буквально заняться нечем... Игра должна называться ограбление кошелька 3

Update is so good that I have to uninstall and reinstall the game for the new update 💖💖

Edit this review again because I have no idea what the F is in the new update that cause my PC to slow absolute the F down, even pausing the update won't stop the download so I have to close Steam to force it to stop.

Okay so I'm giving Payday 3 a negative review not because its a bad game but because of lack for content and a progression system. The heist just get so boring after playing them over and over mainly because there is just not much worth buying in game which is the guns or gloves mask etc... The game just seems like everything is the same but with a different look or design. It lacks everything that Payday 2 had going for it. Payday 2 had so much content it was unreal. I'm giving Payday 3 thumbs down for lack of content and lack of a progression system but the gameplay is spot on if they add more content and weapons etc with a better reward system Payday 3 will have a big recommendation from me.

[h2] 0/10 - [/h2]

gg
On my [b] second heist [/b] I lost any progress, xp, money I made, apparently because I spammed the “go back to menu” button after finishing the heist (AAA game 3 years after “launch,” mind you).

Fast forward 10 hours into ignoring that issue, for no apparent reason, because I didn't even receive an error message this time, I lose any progress from an hour-long heist I made online. I didn't spam the button, no nuthin', just this horrible game warning me I'm not meant to have fun.

[h3] Moral of the story: [/h3] Listen to Steam reviews and be attentive to a game that got lowered in price too many times in a row.

Love the game. The issues I encountered so far are, for one, is that your data is sometimes not in sync with the game, and restarting the game might rewind your data to a slightly older one. Nonetheless, you can grind for the things you lost with not much of an effort. Two, is that lag spikes happen sometimes at any point when playing. Not enough to force you to restart the whole game, but enough for it to be a bit annoying sometimes. Three is a personal issue of mine, but I myself am a solo player, so for this big of a game to be online only kinda irks me in some way. I mean sure there is a solo mode, but not being able to play it offline is something else, for me at least.

Overall, great game and content with some issues here and there. In my opinion, of course.

For $20 with the Year 1 DLC, the game is honestly worth it. Hopefully the devs keep putting the work in to give the experience more staying power. I love the improvements it has over Payday 2, it just needs to give more content to utilize those improvements.

idk, i had fun playing it, but some of the guns that i want to use are locked behind a paywall. TBF though they were at least kind enough to break off the dlc into individual parts. also idk if i just missed it but setting up a playlist for loud isnt something ive been able to do

I bought this game on release and genuinely believe i got scammed and that the developers took advantage of steams refund system. they promised so much more then they delivered. I want my money back. DO NOT BUY THIS GAME

overall experience has definitely taken a step forward.
map DLCs are sadly pretty hit or miss. poor ones suffers from lack of variety and with not much motivation (story purpose) behind doing the heist 
weapon pack dlcs are consistently solid

I really like the game as a PD2 fan, but I honestly understand why more people are playing PD2 than this. The content gap is astronomical, but given enough time I believe this game will be better. The gunplay is crisp, soundtrack is AMAZING just like the prequel, and many QoL changes are in the game that just generally makes it more enjoyable and a smoother experience.

Its fun for a while but still not enough content.
Still i'm very excited for the future!
If we compare the launch state to the current state of the game, I would say, "This game is actually good." Even though I bought it like yesterday. But i think we need offline support.

brotha what can i say about this that hasn't already been said
im only leaving a thumbs up because buried deep under mismanagement and borderline laziness there's a half decent game WAITING to shine

It's just payday 2 but worse honestly, there are so many things that are just worse about it, little things and big things. It has some minor mechanic changes I do like but the whole experience just feels bland, unfinished and not thought out, I adore payday 2, go play that instead, its like over 10x cheaper.

Another 50 DLCs will surely make it better starbreeze....
Sidetrack is the only hope I have for the payday franchise, bless you, keep up the good work.

I kind of enjoy tiny bit but it's still a bad game, get Payday 2 instead.
https://store.steampowered.com/app/218620/PAYDAY_2/

Better graphics, more things to do in missions than Payday 2. The game itself is good, but it could use more weapons, more missions, and a Steam marketplace. The weapon editing section no longer displays how quiet your weapon is, and there's no detection risk, making the game easier. Of course, it's better to choose the lightest vest, which doesn't slow you down as much as the heaviest. Bodyguards have been buffed; they detect faster and have better hearing (when sprinting, they can hear it and report it). Bodybags are no longer used, and you carry every civilian and bodyguard you kill on your back. Cameras detect any attempt to open doors with a lockpick (if you don't have the skill tree). You can now also hack cameras, preventing them from detecting you. The game is almost three years old and still has bugs, but they don't impact gameplay. The game itself is great.
Coming from payday2, tbh this seems very polished the engine just seems so smoother not saying pay2 is bad it just seems outdated like being held up by duct tape

Payday 3 is STILL boring mess. Too many things added which make no sense like OVERKILL weapons for me make it feel of just some game with additional skills which makes it sadly boring. Everything is just overwhelming in really negative way. 5 tutorials on things that in PayDay 2 two tutorials solved? COME ON!

Can't recommend. 3/10.
Could be better. Everything is delayed. new updates are behind dlc. and theres absolute no ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ content just few heists and done

The game's biggest weakness is that it's a sequel to Payday 2, which, by the time Payday 3 released, was completely jam packed full of content that this is missing.
It's a lot of fun, gameplay in general feels a lot better than 2. It's just missing a lot of things that feel 'Payday', like a deep skilltree and perk deck system, and definitely needs more weapons and heists.

Bad. Just bad.

After everything I heard about this game, I wanted to give it a fair chance. After waiting this long for it to pull it's ♥♥♥♥ together, I was hopeful I was in for a good experience. Dear god, was I wrong.

Firstly, the game is pretty smooth and high-quality... when I get to play it. Graphically it's quite good. The combat system helps make up for weak-feeling weaponry and I enjoyed playing the one heist I actually got to play.

Now let's talk about everything WRONG here:

The overall stability and functionality of the game is utterly disastrous! I could, for the most part, connect to a game just fine, but when it came to actually joining the game, I would sometimes crash to desktop, get stuck in spectator mode with NO WAY to leave without having to close the game and the one time I did manage to join a game in progress, I had to stand around like an idiot for like 30 seconds while my character put their mask on, and the heist was pretty much already done anyway.

2 years... and this is how much they've patched the game? Are you ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ serious, Starbreeze!?

As someone who's been a dedicated Payday fan since the very first game when UberHax0rNova played it, I'd hoped at the bottom-line very least it was playable. But most of my time here was either staring at a loading screen or watching as other people played the game.

This is unacceptable.

Do not buy this game.

Here my review on PAYDAY 3 the game itself is not bad and i like the feel of the new engine and the gameplay changes from PAYDAY 2 To PAYDAY 3, it did have a rocky start at launch but it has gone along way since 21. september 2023 and the updates we have gotten are nothing less then amazing year 1 we got a whole bunch of brand new heist new heister and a butt load of cosmetics.

ps ♥♥♥♥ THE CALLING GUARD

It's aggressively okay. Payday 2 is still a much better game 3 years later. Check back in 2028. If Starbreeze is somehow still around and updating this by that point, they've managed to do something right. They're better off giving the team maintaining Payday 2 a shot at Payday 4, because this is STILL lacking basic ♥♥♥♥ that was there 10 years ago. Buy on deep sale and you'll get at least 8ish hours worth of fun. But don't expect the skilltrees, weapon selection, heist offerings, or literally any gameplay element from Payday 2 aside from the raw movement and shooting mechanics to be better here.

Despite all the weapons and mission and skins locked behind DLCs, I still believe that this game is fun.
The amount of weapons and maps you get is still decent for $15 and they still update it (with mainly DLC only content but also with normal stuff)
Overall, this game is worth it if your friend have it, running missions with others is absolutely a great experience that you should try. 
Payday 2 is still better tho.
with all the recent updates, this finally feels like a worthy sequel (payday 2 still currently leads because of the amount of content, but the gameplay and movement in this is ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ awesome)

GAME IS A RIP OFF!!! Their is no Hideout, and no AI commands making solo taking anything without detection impossible even with AI. there is no way to lock the entry door to keep more AI from flooding in sometimes 3-4 come in at once blowing the whole operation. when realistically their are only ever 5-10 people at the bank at once (not including the employee's) at even the largest firms due to high activity of online banking in todays world. very disappointed in the purchase, 4/10 for gaming and playability with the game crashing in the middle of Heists due to poor stability in servers. I was hoping to see an improvement to the Crime style games but its seems they are going in the same direction as Call of Duty and plays like fortnite selling and pushing skins in the in-game store. Not to mention the Civilians will spot you if you tell someone to get down even with no line of sight, if you close all the blinds on "The Withdrawal" job and take out the cameras and guards then try to take the lobby. the people out apparently see through the shades and again bust out the whole operation. I would not recommend this game to players who know and Love payday 2. Also got Banned form the Discord for speaking my mind, don't buy into this woke companies games. Freedom of speech should not be dictated the opinions of other people.

it's definitely a lot better than launch but i think what's really holding the game back right now is weapon choice and customization options. 

i can understand that trying to match the weapon count from 2 is a huge ask but the options here are a bit disappointing still.
Leaving a positive review cuz I want this game to succeed in the future, hopefully with slightly less predatory monetization of future content

The game was not good at release. 

It’s much much better now and I prefer it over Payday 2. Extremely fun.

It's good.

Seems most issues from launch are now fixed. It's got an acceptable amount of content.

This is pretty much a better looking version of Payday 2, as the general gameplay mechanics and gun feel are almost identical.

Easy to recommend when on sale, especially if you are a fan of previous entries.

Payday is still payday fun game love it a few problems, but dont we all have problems? good game still feels like payday but with more tec and stuff. cops new witch is fun and DLCs are cool, need more guns though, and shotguns and a bit of all that! also I want Sydney back too!!

In short, the game has potential to be incredibly good. The missions and gameplay are the best parts of Payday 3. HOWEVER! The entire lack of character in this game compared to 1 and 2 is laughable. 

The menus are uninteresting and downright garbage, the matchmaking is pathetic compared to CrimeNet  (re-introducing CrimeNet would instantly make this game 10x better.) 

The cops are generic and lame compared to its predecessor. I always felt like there was some real (suspended disbelief) immersion to fighting the cops in past games, but in Payday 3 it just feels way too "arcadey", not to mention that there is no variants between  beat SWAT units, the specials are few and far between besides a shield. "Zapper" doesn't hit as hard as the name Taser does (I know its probably because of copyright.) 

The game feels surreal to play, if anything it just makes me want to play Payday 2 or even Payday The Heist. Payday 3 CAN be good.

Also screw paid DLC, that's a joke and should be an instant turnoff for anyone looking to buy this game at full price.

It's actually a pretty fun game


Definitely better now since its launch
Not worth full price for sure with the lack of content, but its a decent framework now hopefully they will pull their heads in and polish it like payday 2
Fun gameplay with most content locked behind an incredible amount of DLCs. Start your own lobbies because if you don't, there's a good chance the host will kick you out right before you win.

the only people that think this game is bad are control freaks ima be honest. i've had fun with this game no matter what change they present, it's fun, better than it was at launch, and most importantly has great animations. sure the dlc paywall for some weapons kinda sucks, but then again, it's only a couple bucks. good investment if you're gonna play this game often imo
and the skin system is better than payday 2's, i will die on this hill

This game launched in a state that had me refund it, but just recently I've reinvested. The game has gotten a lot better and I thoroughly enjoy it now. Though it still suffers with a limited amount of content and somewhat lacking heist RNG.

Hopefully this improves with more and affordable DLC. If this game had as much content as Payday 2 I'd see it as a superior product.

PAYDAY 3 is a decent game
Not too shabby for another PAYDAY release, but not as exciting as PD2.
I concur, you should try it.

so far so good.
First time playing this, and I’ve played Payday 2 before. This is the first time I’ve ever entered a bank and stolen everything without getting shot at or caught. This game reminds me a lot of the movie Heat because of its stealth mechanics.

However, it does need more maps and guns. I think there are only 8 maps in the game right now. If it had more maps and weapons like Payday 2, then I think it would have even bigger potential than Payday 2. Also, this game could have a really good story mode with these mechanics.

It is not bad now then it launched, still has more ways to get back on it's feet. Would recommend to get it on sale and get friends who would like to play it and have fun and chill sessions here and there.
unreal engine kills all novelty and fun payday 2 had and created a very rigid, boring shooter

I absolutely adored PAYDAY2, and coming over to PAYDAY3, there are noticeable improvements. The movement feels fluid, gunplay feels satisfying and rewarding, and stealth offers some interesting new mechanics (like lockpicking & glass cutting minigames - far better than watching a circle fill in PAYDAY2 lol), and the graphics and level design... oh my, the visuals... well done. 

The foundation has been constructed. Dealing with a botched launch and years of deserved criticism, the game feels like it's in a good spot to starting adding some serious content (more weapons & heists pls). You have such potential here, Starbreeze! 

Pros:
Great FPS gameplay
Rewarding mechanics
Beautiful graphics
New takes on previous mechanics
Interesting level design

Cons:
Grouping up with friends can be inconsistent, and the game is prone to disconnects in the lobby
Solo mode is still in beta
Repetitiveness/Tedious contracts
Content (to be contondered!)

Can't wait to see what the future holds :)

Don't listen to anyone. Payday 3 is awesome (now)! The gameplay is snappy and the moment to moment decision making keeps you invested in every heist. The numerous updates have improved on every level of the launch experience that was so hated.

[h3]TL;DR :[/h3] Core features and heists are top tier and the game is definitely worth picking already, but the game still have a long road before reaching the level of payday 2 in term of content. With more content, it will definitely become a worthy successor of Payday 2.

______________________________

[b]The core gameplay features are solid and represent a major improvement over Payday 2.[/b] Stealth has received a lot of attention with new mechanics that make it more deep, tactical and immersive, while loud gameplay feels much more like an actual heist.
One feature I particularly enjoy is the hostage system. When things go loud, first responders arrive before the full police assault begins, and you can trade hostages to delay the assault and buy your crew more time. It adds a layer of strategy and reinforces the heist fantasy.

[b]The heists themselves are excellent and easily stand alongside the ones from Payday 2.[/b] From what i've seen so far, they feature multiple objectives and approaches that encourage replayability.

[b]That said, the game still needs way more content, as it feels quite bare-bones compared to Payday 2.[/b] Features such as AI team mates loadout, heists pre-planning like in P2, and the jukebox feature would be welcome additions. We need a larger selection of masks, outfits, weapons, attachments, gadgets, heists, and heisters as well. (Both heisters from Payday 2 and new heisters please)

I've picked the game + dlcs very cheaply during Steam sales and considering the amount of content currently available, it's well worth the asking price but there is still a long road for it to reach the level of Payday 2 in term of content

is the peak of payday, still needs more content though but instead they are giving it to payday 2 because the community were a bunch of cry babies over it

and hopefully they stop the old trend which every content update had to be behind paywalls, i dont want to have to pay $100+ dollars worth of content to enjoy it like with payday 2 (for this one i bought the year 1 edition at $9,10 and then the second anniversary at $4,96 so i appreciate the regional pricing, respect <3)

though i would try this game again after 3 years, thought i would see a total different game from launch. Nope i was dead wrong, unless you pay money for their DLC, base game is still bad and cant hold a candle to payday 2. I WAITED 3 YEARS

Payday 3 has mixed reviews for a reason. Yes, the game is better than launch. Yes, the game has some reworked mechanics that make it a bit more enjoyable than doing the same actions in Paydays 2, such as lock picking and item interactions in general. Yes, stealth is so much better now. But I think there is 2 things that this game lacks that made Payday 2 great: Personality and Perk Decks.

The personality is very important to Payday's identity and is the reason why a lot of fans didn't really care for the crossovers and Joy being added to Payday 2. Payday has always had this apathetic and snarky middle finger attitude to the capitalistic system and authority, the gang is literally a bunch of psychos that want the world's riches to themselves, but Payday 3 has this very limp adaptation of that vibe, even beating Payday 2 at it's worst when it would drop the ball on maintaining it. It feels more like a game that was inspired by Payday but with a better budget than a proper sequel.

This also bleeds a little into Perk Decks not being in the game. I never knew how much Perk Decks filled out the identity of the gameplay until it was removed and replaced with a fairly lackluster skill tree. I get why it was done, figuring out what Perk Deck works with what skills and what loadout isn't easy but once you found what worked for you and your crew, it created this feeling of being a proper member of the gang, playing your role and insuring that the heist will be pulled off. Dumbing down the gameplay to appeal to more gamers kinda hurt what made Payday what it is. It makes it feel more generic and stale, like I'm gaining money for cosmetic nonsense instead of to improve my build. 

Even if this game did do more to make it more like Payday 2, I don't think it can live up. This is even more apparent when you realize that they are still making content for Payday 2 and their latest update as of me writing this is the PUBG collab which no one asked for, no one has said anything positive about it, and I have no clue how collabing with an irrelevant game is gonna do any good for Payday as a brand. 

The game is good but it could have been great, it deserves it's reputation.

Unironically, the game freezes when i attempt to open the Skills menu when in a lobby or on the main menu. Absolute madness that i'm unable to access such a basic function of a game.

EDIT: Online Lobbies don't function. they take upwards of 3 minutes to load, another minute waiting for the Ready button be useable, only to then be frozen at a Loading Screen

Terrible how these features were in PD2 and functioned effortlessly

Game is going in the right direction. Skills are actually pd2 skill trees again and hopefully we'll get infamy back. I think this game has a chance of making a great comeback.

I like the gameplay and its hard. (add harder difficulties please)

give it some more years and it will be a successor to PD2

if you are a solo player, do not bother buying this game, the offline mode simply does not work and they have no intentions on fixing it. you can complete a whole heist and get nothing, and its no fault of your own, its the developers. i hope their company fails, i sincerely do

This game doesn't let me join others or my friends. I always get stuck on the setting up heist when joining others. I have now spent hours trying to join others, and no matter what I have done be it change firewall privelages to restarting my computer and giving it a few weeks it has never been fixed.
Can't even play multiplayer with my friends, infinite lobby loading screen. Very buggy game, until they can at least let me play with my friends I don't recommend this game
wow just remove all my ♥♥♥♥ from the game... everything got reset gear and skill tree all gone. thanks. would rec if you hate your life
Its been multiple years and this game still doesnt hold a flame to even the original payday game.

hadn't played since release logged in to try and play and cannot gain any progression to level my character via doing the challenges. its bugged and says i have 24k IP but the bar doesn't progress no matter how many challenges i complete or heists.

stay away, this game has been a mess since it launched and seems its only getting worse.

having played payday 3 a fair bit its not bad, but its not good. it misses the mark that makes payday 2 so fun. In 3 the guns are very limited andmost of them are just bad. even the good ones sound good but feel like shooting a bb gun. The game is far too easy on anything but overkill, and every single enemy becomes a bullet sponge of overkill. The ability trees are poorly thought out and feel empty compared to the fun ways you could minmax builds in payday 2. Some features like hostage shields are a good and fun feature, but overall your way better off just playing payday 2. Its got way more content, the gunplay actually feels good and balanced on all difficulties and the enemy ai and variety is just better. Not to mention the cops push you in groups in payday 2. In 3 they just constantly flow into the building from every direction all the time, leaving little thought or strategizing to be done.

With that said, payday 2 is an awesome game. buy that instead.

Lack of content, dlc too expensive for what they offer, bad ally AI, boring heist and bad objectives; just to mention some of the problems this game has.

Just go and play the second one, but only if you want to spend a lot of money in dlcs.
Actually pretty fun now. Is it perfect? Nooo, but on sale for the base game its pretty good ^^
Better than when it was dropped but could use more stuff to do missions get old fast
it's honestly pretty fun though the microtransactions are a turn off i still find the gameplay loop enjoyable enough to look past that
Recently came back to the game, first thing i see bugs! Im lvl 130 ish and went to the store and cannot buy guns bellow my level ???
Can they speed up the time it takes to join a heist and also fix the matchmaking errors, gawd. Bit basic features compared to Payday 2 but otherwise is pretty great.

Personally consider this game a good successor of payday : the heist. It doesnt have much content for now but hopefully we'll get more in time.  I haven't bought it the day it was released  and as far as i watched the news and checked so many YT videos i understood that i didn't lose much. It has changed and in a good way. Definitely recommend it now and the prices are appropriate. The possible cons are the game connection stability but i haven't encountered it that much or let's say at all and i live in a region where this game is unavailable.

Aside from the awful corny ass voicelines and weird constant aura farming from the police, the game holds up EXTREMELY well, the difficulty spike is nice, i have experienced almost no bugs, the ones i did experience were non-game breaking tiny ones, and the weapon unlocking system is fun and not as instant as payday 2, its payday 1 style but with the fact you need to pay for them as well.

I'll just say this I'm not buying a single more DLC for a game with LESS content then the last game why would i EVER pay a single dime for less content, like originally I bought it coz I like the game its a more refined PD2 in the skeleton and I still like it HOWEVR I am not buying DLC sorry...I'd say make all DLC you release free until you have even half the content that PD2 has and THEN start paying for DLC afterword maybe, honestly gun packs shouldn't be DLC if it aint got a heist what am I using the guns for, what to play the same game the same heists over and over again with new guns...nah. like maybe 8-10 years in the games life if it survives that long I'll pay for a big DLC pack but as of right now... no, you got my money for the base game witch I enjoyed but I won't pay for DLC till way later

Honestly after the shaky first year, I was skeptical about the game, but after some time of playing it again, the game has been a blast to play through especially with friends, it's definitely gotten a lot better to the point I honestly either recommend getting on sale, or just buying the game in general. A good way to burn a few hours without much thought
Unrelated to my(boring) experience with this game(PD2 is infinitely better), but why does this game have the hentai tag?

"Polish, but at what cost?"
As long time Payday's fans. Payday 3 is not all the bad, movements are improved with slide and vault. Weapons animations are fantastic. Casing mode allow for more tactical ways to stealth. Ping system are great at communicating quickly. The game now run better because it's not on ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ racing game engine anymore.
But.
Heists are less variety than Payday 2, RNG in heists are even less. Not enough weapons, masks, modification, missions.
I know this is probably meant to be modernised Payday The Heist not sequel to Payday 2. However, it's not like you can ignore all the Payday 2 ever was. And just do what's modern in the current era of gaming, call it a day.
I hope this game will get fixed, I really do. I hope all these negative thoughts in my mind will be proven wrong.
At the moment, I can only recommend to get the game if the bundles are on sales. 
Don't get just the base game, it's not enough content.

game bugs out half the time. dc lags it got it all. the gun feels fine the eneimes are hp piñata just like payday2. overall is kinda payday 2 with more bugs less players and better graphics. getting kicked at the last sec so i wont get any reward sure is nice.

Gave this game another shot after dipping my toe in it during its launch.

It feels like its in a pretty good state now and the core gameplay to me feels like its actually on an equal level with Payday 2 and even easily surpassing it in certain things like stealth and stuff. The only issue is amoung of content now.

The cracks in the foundation have been sealed up to a stable level and they already build up a very nice ground level which makes for a comfy, modern living space and while Payday 2's "house" certainly shows its age quite a bit by now, its just towering like a skyscraper contentwise.

I do think I can certainly recommend this game now especially if ya get it on a sale. I am just worried that the devs end up stopping to support the game right as it got good enough to get excited over future content. Only time will tell

Despite the bad reviews, I would say this game is fun and removed some of the annoyance that Payday 2 had (shields now having a glass visor that u can break, ATM no longer needing a mandatory saw/ECM, stealth makes a bit more sense, etc.) However, it still have a couple of flaws like the enemy AI logic and spawning being a bit strange but some of these bugs/annoyance can be fixed by mods. Do know by default modded lobbies dont show by default as well.

Its not a perfect game and doesn't have as much content as Payday 2 had, but its for sure not super buggy during launch and have a couple of QOL that I enjoyed over Payday 2. Get the game on discount if possible, or try it out and refund it if you dont like it. Overall a 8/10!

The game itself? Very very fun, the gunplay feels significantly better, that terrible RUSH GRIT EDGE system for skills is finally gone with a much better and improved skilltree set, the quality of life improvements are significantly noticeable with the game feeling like a breath of fresh air after the atrocious launch. Overall, if you haven't played payday 3, play it. If you've already played it, try it again and give it another go.

The only bad thing going for this game at the moment is lack of content. However, now that the game is in an enjoyable and fun state, Overkill will find balance with QoL improvements and adding a good solid amount of content to keep the game fresh while fixing all its issues.

I was never exposed to PAYDAY 3's launch, so my opinion on the game is purely as a new player (played a lot of PD2, including the super secret). I do think it's a very solid game that does some things better than PD2 but lacks content and is unfortunately online-only (requires an internet connection to play). A lot of the mechanics and heists have been reworked since the launch so most of the old reviews don't really hold up to the current state of the game. I do miss perk decks though and hope that Starbreeze finds a way to implement a unique system similar to it, overkill weapons are fun but there's only 5.5 of them in the game (the Interceptor doesn't really count). Sociopath is really really awesome as an overkill weapon and I hope we get more cool ideas like it in DLCs.

I would recommend buying the game on sale.

I legitimately think payday 3 is on the mend from where it was at launch. The Devs are really trying to undo the sabotage the publisher did and while they aren't quite there yet with a few things, like the vendor UI, they are actively working through systems to make it better.

Bought at release and i have to say it got improved but keep an eye on updates before you buy and regret it. There are a few missions you will be re-running for quite alot of time but less than pd2 still its very enjoyable going stealh/loud with many different builds.
the perfect game for heist lovers, a thrilling experience, great way to spend your friday nights causing chaos amongst banks, jewelery shops, etc.

I do actually believe when people said this game was good now, hell yeah it is good!
 a little problem is just the game has too low Amount of content 
but it is a very enjoyable game

i preordered the game and id say the release was really bad but with time and care even though the devs dont really balance well i guess they try enjoy the game and with time it could possibly be as good or even better than payday2 if they actually care about the game i believe the game has a lot of potential and with the skill tree update they brought back the fun with makeing builds for now id say the game is a 7.5/10 but i believe it could get better with more maps that are sure to come and personally id love to have the safe house feature from payday 2 but more customisable anyway its payday fellas <3

Also I will get really bad screen freezing and lag spikes even though the game runs smoothly most of the time.

genuinley did not like a minute of playing this game. it feels like a diluted holly wood version of the payday i know and love

Give PAYDAY 3 a chance, they're trying.
Of course, it will take some time before it's as great as PD2, but I personally think that people wanted too much from 3 considering how big was PD2, and people possibly wanted the same amount of stuff on release.

this game feels average P2W game slop, this game is just focus on money than enoying or gameplay my opinion, if u really like games like this buy Pay Day 2

i like it, but for how bare bones the game feels from a company that made payday 2, its not worth it currently, even if on sale. an update sort of killed build variety it felt like, you will just use the same stuff over and over cause like 3 builds feel to just be the most reliable. just payday 2, its got a new dev team that is putting in more effort into that than what 3 is getting

If you use a controller do not buy this game you won't have a good time even with steam input. Also this game is worse than crime boss. That game would be a better choice and you can get it dirty cheep on sale or loaded.com the only thing I wish cb had is weapon customisation

Really great game, clearly a step up from Payday 2. It sadly doesn't have NEARLY the same amount of content Payday 2 has, such as heists, weapons, masks, and more. Concealment was a thing they removed from the game and I'd like to see it return in some way or another. 
I'd also say it doesn't run that well, I've experienced stuttering and heavy lag spikes from time to time (sometimes the screen froze for a whole second), not enough that it has a big impact personally, but still there and very noticeable. 
Despite its flaws, I still enjoy playing the game, I'm having fun, so that's why I'm writing a good review. If they fix some bugs and add (a lot) more content then this could definitely be as good of a game as Payday 2 was.

Being a pd2 playing with 850+ hours, i was really excited to play. and when i did play it was pretty fun, the gameplay is okay i dont mind it, it feels engaging at higher difficulties. the reason for my negative review is the following:

-the price for what is effectively just a less content-filled payday 2
-the ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ ai photos. ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ man is it so hard to hire a basic ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ artist for a character portrait, or a contractor portrait???? you can even just port over the old ones i dont ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ care it sucks to look at i ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ hate it oh my god. It takes away from the overall okay aesthetic the game puts up, pushing it to make it look ♥♥♥♥♥♥ and unpolished. literally you could make the game so much more bearable if you just did any bit of honest work in making the assets of your game.
-no distance filter for looking for games
-not the best optimization, fps drops at weird ass parts.

there is a complete and utter lack of direction with this game, i like the gameplay, i like the style (mostly of what isnt ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ ai) and i like the community. The devs are clearly trying to patch up the ♥♥♥♥ show that the game used to be, such as with the peer to peer hosting update, but to make this game good would require an update that practically redos the entire game. I have optimism but i dont give my support.

Unfortunately, this is the worst pre-order of my life. As a die-hard fan of Payday 2, it was awful to feel like this. The game just does not feel fun. Playing loud feels like a slug, making the quiet option the only one viable and fun. But then we actually get to the stealth part, it feels like absolutely nothing is explained. In Payday 2, I felt like I knew what to do and steps to follow, slowly through retries creating pathways of how to make it through. Here it feels like I have to re-invent the heist and find obscure things on the map that are poorly marked out. Without a youtube tutorial before hand its just a guessing game. RIP my money, and to the 2 people I told to pre-order, I'm sorry.
game had a lot of potential but now probably a peace of ♥♥♥♥. it was interesting to play on old maps from payday 2 but in new design however fps drops from 120 to 30 everytime dont let me enjoy it.
